Prof. Dr. Önder Pekcan Ranked Among the World’s Top Scientists

Prof. Dr. Önder Pekcan, a faculty member at Kadir Has University, has been recognized as a “Top Scholar” for 2024 by ScholarGPS in acknowledgment of his outstanding academic work and scientific contributions. According to the latest data published by ScholarGPS, Prof. Dr. Pekcan ranks within the top 0.5% of over 30 million scholars worldwide.

ScholarGPS rankings are based on key academic performance indicators such as the number of publications, citation impact, and h-index, and are used to identify the most influential scientists globally.

With notable achievements in the fields of Genetics, Phase Transitions, and Polymer Science, Prof. Dr. Pekcan stands out not only in his specific areas of expertise but also for his multidisciplinary contributions to science.

As a university, we are proud of our faculty member’s international recognition and will continue to support his inspiring academic journey.
